title: Enhanced Equipment
description: Adds new gear to Minecraft, all gear can be crafted with items from vanilla Minecraft
body:
Enhanced Equipment


This mod adds:

  1. Copper armour and tools
  2. Amethyst armour and tools
  3. Full turtle armour
  4. Cosmic armour and tools
  5. Crafting recipes for chainmain armour

Cosmic gear can be crafted by upgrading a piece of netherite gear with an echo shard using a smithing table

Follow me on twitter @BLAZE_GLITCH

Check the gallery tab for more details
